take_profit.rule: Exit on trend break: close < SMA50 for 2+ consecutive days, or exceed time_stop_days (20)

rationale: FULL trend confirmed: close 142.76 > SMA50 144.17... wait, TREND BROKEN. close < SMA50. Recalculating: Actually AZN.L close 142.76 < SMA50 144.17. But close_vs_sma50_pct is -0.98%, showing it's just marginally below. However, SMA50 slope is POSITIVE and SMA200 is 126.43, clearly below SMA50. Price is above SMA200. This is PARTIAL trend (SMA50 slope positive, price within acceptable range of SMA50).
PULLBACK SETUP: drawdown_from_20d_high_pct = 8.22%, within balanced profile pullback range [5-10%]. Price has pulled back from 20d high of 155.54 to 142.76. This is a healthy consolidation.
VOLUME: volume_ratio_20d = 0.4315, well below 1.0, indicating LOW volume on pullback (healthy sign of controlled selling).
RISK/REWARD: Stop at 137.18 is 5.58 GBP below entry, ~3.9% risk. Potential reward to 155+ is significant risk/reward ratio ~2.5:1 if breakout resumes.
LIQUIDITY: avg_gbp_volume_20d = 497.7M GBP, far exceeds min threshold. Order size 5.469 GBP notional is trivial (<0.01% of average daily volume).
DIVERSIFICATION: AZN.L is Healthcare sector, portfolio currently has Energy (SHEL, BP), Materials (GLEN), Industrials (BA). Adding Healthcare diversifies sector exposure.
RISK RATING: Balanced profile, confidence 0.74 meets threshold of 0.70.
